get.description: Returns a welcome message.

get.summary: Get minimal user directory for dropdowns/pickers

Public org directory — minimal user data (id, name, avatar) for dropdowns and pickers.

delete.summary: Remove a user from the organization
delete.description: Soft deletes a user. Requires system.admin permission.

Retrieves companies for a specific user. Requires CRM permissions (org or team-scoped).
Retrieves activities performed by a specific user. Requires CRM or Sales permissions (org or team-scoped).

put.description: Replaces all org-scoped roles for a user (sync). Requires system.admin permission.

parameters.description: Transfer type: pending = all pending transfers, sent = transfers sent by user, received = transfers received by user

file.description: Image file (max 2 MB, converted to WebP 256x256)

400.description: Invalid file or file too large

post.description: Creates a new user account with email and password. Sends a verification code to the provided email.

201.description: User registered successfully. Verification email sent.

400.description: Invalid input data or email already registered

post.description: Sends a password reset code to the provided email address.

200.description: Password reset email sent if account exists

post.description: Sets a new password using the verification code received via email during the password reset flow.
Verifies a user email using the code sent during registration. Sets a refresh token cookie on success.

200.description: Email verified successfully. Refresh token set as HTTP-only cookie.

post.description: Sends a new verification code to the email address for accounts that are not yet verified.

200.description: Verification code resent if account exists and is unverified

400.description: Invalid email or account already verified

post.description: Authenticates a user with email and password. Sets a refresh token as an HTTP-only cookie. Returns user data including available organizations.

200.description: Login successful. Refresh token set as HTTP-only cookie.

401.description: Invalid email or password

post.description: Logout with different scopes: session (current device), organization (all sessions in org), or global (everywhere). If no parameters provided, defaults to current session logout.

organizationId.description: Revoke all sessions for this org

401.description: Invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Uses the refresh token from the HTTP-only cookie to issue a new short-lived access token. Rate limited to 5 requests per minute.

401.description: Invalid, expired, or missing refresh token

post.description: Changes the password for the current authenticated user

401.description: Invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Issues a tenant-scoped token (30min expiry) for accessing a specific organization. Creates a new session for this organization. Requires identity token (1h expiry).

400.description: User does not belong to organization

401.description: Identity token required

post.description: Refreshes an existing tenant token (30min expiry) using the identity token. Validates organization membership and token signature.

401.description: Invalid identity or tenant token

data.description: When withMemberships=true, items include memberships array

get.description: Returns team details with roles and available permissions. Admins can view any team; team members can view their own.

patch.description: Updates team name, leader, or other properties.

delete.description: Soft deletes a team and its memberships.

get.summary: Get all members of a team
get.description: Returns all team memberships with user info and assigned team roles. Admins can view any team; members can view their own.

post.description: Creates a team membership and assigns specified team roles. Admins can add to any team; team leaders can add to their own.

get.description: Returns all team members who have the specified team role assigned.

delete.summary: Remove a user from a team

delete.summary: Batch remove a team role from multiple users

patch.description: Replaces all current user assignments for the team role with the provided list.

parameters.description: Invitation token from the email link

delete.description: Cancels a pending invitation. Requires system.admin permission.

post.description: Public endpoint for new users. Creates a user account and joins the organization using the invitation token.

400.description: Invalid token, expired invitation, or validation error

Protected endpoint for existing users. Adds the organization to the authenticated user's account.

get.summary: Get commission payments with optional view type filter
get.description: Returns commission payments based on view type (all, my, team). When type is omitted, returns all available tabs. When type is provided, returns only that specific tab (for load more). Follows the Deal List pattern (no stages, no pool). Team view returns Record<teamId, TabData> for all accessible teams unless teamId is specified.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional: Commission payment view type to fetch. all = all org payments (requires sales.view/sales.manage), my = payments where I'm the recipient, team = payments for deals with team stakeholder (requires team_sales permissions). Omit to fetch all available tabs.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: Optional: Specific team UUID to filter by (used with type=team for load more)

200.description: Commission payments retrieved successfully. Response structure follows Deal List pattern: { all?: TabData, my?: TabData, team?: Record<teamId, TabData> }

all.description: All organization commission payments (if user has sales permissions)

team.description: Team commission payments (if user has team_sales permissions)

availableTeams.description: All teams the user can access for team tab

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions for requested type

patch.description: Updates the status of a commission payment. Can be accessed by users with sales.manage permission OR by the payment recipient (to approve only).

403.description: Forbidden - Requires sales.manage permission or must be recipient

post.description: Creates a new organization with the current user as the owner. Uses identity token (no org context needed).

put.description: Uploads a logo/avatar for an organization. Requires SYSTEM_ADMIN. Image is converted to WebP (256x256). Max 2 MB.

file.description: Image file (max 2 MB, converted to WebP 256x256)

400.description: Invalid file or file too large

put.description: Updates an organization. User must be the owner of the organization.

delete.description: Soft deletes an organization. User must be the owner of the organization.

403.description: Forbidden - Must be the organization owner

post.description: Uploads a file to cloud storage (max 50 MB). Returns the public URL.

400.description: No file provided or file exceeds size limit

get.summary: Get leads for Kanban view (grouped by stage)
get.description: Returns leads in a flexible nested structure based on parameters. NO TYPE: Returns all available tabs (all, my, team, pool, teamPool) based on permissions. WITH TYPE: Returns only that specific tab. WITH TYPE + STAGEID: Returns only that stage for pagination (load more). WITH TYPE + TEAMID: Filters to specific team (for team/teamPool types). Note: pool and teamPool have no stages - leads are in "New" stage until claimed/assigned.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional: Lead view type to fetch. all = all org leads (requires crm.view/crm.manage), my = leads assigned to current user, pool = unassigned leads (no stages), team = team leads (requires team_crm permissions), teamPool = team pool leads (no stages). If omitted, returns all available tabs.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: Required for team/teamPool types: Team UUID to filter by

parameters.name: stageId
parameters.description: Optional: Filter to a single stage (for "load more" on a Kanban column). Use stage UUID for regular stages, or "archived" for archived leads column.

teamInfo.description: Team information (only present for team/teamPool types)

400.description: Bad request - Missing required type parameter or teamId for team types

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions for requested type

post.description: Creates a new lead. The lead must be associated with an existing person.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

get.description: Returns leads as a flat paginated list grouped by tabs. Initial request (no type): returns all available tabs with first page. Load more (with type): returns only that tab with requested page.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional: Specify to load more data for a specific tab. Omit to get all tabs.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: Required for team/teamPool types: Team UUID

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field (default: createdAt for active leads, archivedAt for archived leads). Options: createdAt, updatedAt, archivedAt, stage, firstName, lastName, fullName, name (alias for firstName), leadSource

parameters.name: showArchived
parameters.description: If true, show only archived leads; if false/undefined (default), show only active leads

400.description: Bad request - Missing required type parameter or teamId for team types

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions for requested type

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific lead.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to view lead

patch.description: Updates an existing lead.

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to update lead

delete.description: Soft deletes a lead with cascade. REQUIRES: system.admin permission. REQUIRES: Lead must be archived for at least 30 days before deletion. Requires explicit confirmation (name match). This operation cascade soft-deletes all related records (stakeholders, history, transfers, activities, property interests). Deals are preserved but their originatingLead reference is set to NULL. Person entity is never deleted.

confirmName.description: Full name of the lead (must match exactly for confirmation)

400.description: Lead not archived, or not archived for 30 days, or confirmation name does not match

404.description: Lead not found or already deleted

post.description: Archives a lead, removing it from active pipeline but preserving all data. Validates that no active deals originate from this lead and cancels pending transfers.

400.description: Cannot archive: Lead has active deals

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to archive lead

404.description: Lead not found or already archived

post.description: Restores an archived lead to active pipeline. If the lead's stage was deleted, assigns it to the "New" stage.

400.description: Cannot unarchive: No valid "New" stage found

403.description: Forbidden - Insufficient permissions to unarchive lead

post.description: Archives multiple leads in one request. Users with CRM_MANAGE can archive any lead. Users without CRM_MANAGE can only archive leads they have WRITE/FULL access to. Allows partial success - archives what it can and reports failures.

leadIds.description: Array of lead UUIDs to archive

200.description: Bulk archive completed (may have partial failures)

403.description: Forbidden - No access to any leads or insufficient permissions

post.description: Restores multiple archived leads to active pipeline in one request. Users with CRM_MANAGE can unarchive any lead. Users without CRM_MANAGE can only unarchive leads they have WRITE/FULL access to. Allows partial success - unarchives what it can and reports failures.

leadIds.description: Array of lead UUIDs to unarchive

200.description: Bulk unarchive completed (may have partial failures)

403.description: Forbidden - No access to any leads or insufficient permissions

post.description: Soft deletes multiple leads at once. REQUIRES: All leads must be archived for at least 30 days before deletion. Users with CRM_MANAGE can delete any lead. Users without CRM_MANAGE can only delete leads they have FULL access to or created. Allows partial success - deletes what it can and reports failures.

leadIds.description: Array of lead UUIDs to delete

200.description: Bulk delete completed (may have partial failures)

400.description: Invalid input data or leads not meeting archive requirements

403.description: Forbidden - No access to any leads or insufficient permissions

post.summary: Import leads from CSV or Excel
post.description: Imports leads from a CSV or Excel file. Requires crm.manage permission.

file.description: CSV or Excel file containing leads

assignedToId.description: Optional: User ID to assign imported leads to

assignedTeamId.description: Optional: Team ID to assign imported leads to

get.description: Downloads a template CSV file showing the required format for lead imports.

get.summary: Download example Excel file for lead import

post.description: Add a new stakeholder and adjust others atomically. Normal agents can claim from their team pool for themselves. Team managers can assign to team members. Org admins can assign to anyone.

get.description: Shows available commission and adjustment options
Shows what adjustments are needed before removal

patch.description: Update multiple stakeholders at once. Commission total must be 0% or 100% after update.

delete.description: Remove a stakeholder. If the stakeholder has commission, it is automatically redistributed proportionally among remaining unlocked stakeholders.

post.description: Assign a lead from the pool to a team

patch.description: Org admin only. Update the commission on an existing team-only stakeholder row. Used to grow or shrink the team budget without re-assigning the team. The team must already have a team-only stakeholder row on the lead.

post.description: Remove all stakeholders and return lead to pool

Claim a lead from the global pool or a specific team pool. When claiming from a team pool, provide teamId to target the correct team. A user can claim the same lead from multiple team pools, resulting in one stakeholder per team.

WITH TYPE + STAGEID: Returns only that stage for pagination (load more). WITH TYPE + TEAMID: Filters to specific team (for team type).

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Optional: Deal view type to fetch. all = all org deals (requires sales.view/sales.manage), my = deals assigned to current user, team = team deals (requires team_sales permissions). If omitted, returns all available tabs.

parameters.name: teamId
parameters.description: Optional for team type: Team UUID to filter by. If omitted with type=team, returns all teams.

parameters.name: stageId
parameters.description: Optional: Filter to a single stage (for "load more" on a Kanban column). Use "archived" for archived deals column.

teamInfo.description: Team information (only present for team/teamPool types)

parameters.name: teamId

delete.description: Permanently (soft) deletes a deal that has been archived for at least 30 days. Requires system.admin permission and explicit confirmation. This operation cascade soft-deletes all related records (stakeholders, contacts, commissions, activities). Contact/Lead entities are never deleted. IMPORTANT: Deal must be archived for at least 30 days before deletion is allowed.

info.title: Propwise CRM API
info.description: Real Estate CRM Backend API — authentication, CRM, RBAC, real estate, and integrations.

api-key.name: x-api-key
api-key.description: API Key for public endpoints (N8N, webhooks)

teamPermissions.description: Team-level permissions keyed by team ID

BatchRoleOperationResponse.description: Response for batch/bulk role operations (assign, remove, set, bulk)

BatchRoleErrorDetail.description: Error detail for a single failed batch role operation

systemType.description:
For system stages, this identifies the type and programmatic behavior.
For custom stages, this is null.

isSystem.description: Computed property: true if systemType is set.

isConverted.description: Computed property: true if this is the CONVERTED stage.

isDisqualified.description: Computed property: true if this is the DISQUALIFIED stage.

isTerminal.description: Computed property: true if this is a terminal stage (CONVERTED or DISQUALIFIED).

leadId.description: Lead ID (to avoid circular reference, we don't include full Lead entity)

stage.description: The stage that was completed (the one we left)

nextStage.description: The stage the lead moved to (optional, for analytics)

enteredAt.description: When the lead entered this stage

durationSeconds.description:
Duration in this stage (in seconds)
Calculated as: createdAt - enteredAt

changedBy.description: User who performed the stage change

createdAt.description: When the record was created (also = when lead exited this stage)

user.description:
User stakeholder (nullable for team-only stakeholders)
When user is null, this represents a team pool assignment

primaryStakeholder.description:
Primary stakeholder (user or team) assigned to this deal
Contains the EntityStakeholder with isPrimary=true

Primary stakeholder (user or team-only)
Contains the current owner/assignee of this lead
Can be a user stakeholder (user + optional team) or team-only stakeholder (team, no user)
Populated by service layer during list/detail fetching

firstName.description:
First name for person creation/matching.
Required if personId is not provided.

dateOfBirth.description:
Date of birth for person matching/creation.
Used in matching logic: no match if dateOfBirth differs (unless undefined).

assignedUserId.description:
User ID to assign as stakeholder with 100% commission.
If not provided and teamId is provided, lead goes to team pool.
If neither provided, lead goes to organization pool.

sourceChannelId.description:
Source channel ID (PersonChannel) - the communication channel
through which this lead was acquired.

primaryStakeholder.description:
Primary stakeholder (user or team-only)
Contains the current owner/assignee of this lead
Can be a user stakeholder (user + optional team) or team-only stakeholder (team, no user)
Populated by service layer during list/detail fetching

companyName.description: Company name for B2B context (display only, NOT a relation).

stageChangeReason.description:
Optional reason for stage change.
Stored in LeadStageHistory.notes for audit trail.
Can be made required via system settings in the future.

accessLevel.description:
Access level for the new stakeholder.
- READ: Observer / view only
- WRITE: Can modify the entity
- FULL: Full access including transfer and delete

Defaults to FULL for primary stakeholders, READ for non-primary.

toUserId.description:
Target user ID (for user-to-user or team-to-user transfers)
Either toUserId or toTeamId must be provided

toTeamId.description:
Target team ID (for user-to-team or team-to-team transfers)
Either toUserId or toTeamId must be provided

fromKeepsPercentage.description:
What percentage of commission the original owner keeps (0-100).
e.g., 30 means they keep 30% of the commission pool.
If 0 or not provided, original owner is removed as stakeholder.

fromCommissionTotal.description: Sender's total commission at transfer creation time. Used to compute receiver's share: fromCommissionTotal - fromKeepsPercentage.

primaryStakeholder.description:
Primary stakeholder (user or team) assigned to this deal
Contains the EntityStakeholder with isPrimary=true

propertyInterestId.description:
Optional: Specific property interest ID from the lead to use.
If not provided, uses the primary interest (or first non-deleted).
Only applicable when originatingLeadId is provided.

stageChangeReason.description:
Optional reason for stage change.
Stored in DealStageHistory.notes for audit trail.
Can be made required via system settings in the future.

refProjectId.description: Reference DB project ID (integer, null to clear)

refUnitId.description: Reference DB unit ID (integer, null to clear)

to.description: Phone number of the recipient (with country code)

whatsappMessageId.description: WhatsApp message ID returned after sending

mediaUrl.description: Media URL if message contains media

isPublished.description: Set to true to publish, false to unpublish. Omit to leave unchanged.
